questions: What is the patient's WHO Clinical Stage (I, II, III, or IV)?
What is the patient's CD4 count (cells/cu.mm)?
Does the patient have TB co-infection? (Yes/No)
If yes, is the TB Pulmonary or Extra pulmonary?
Does the patient have HIV-HBV or HIV-HCV co-infection? (Yes/No)
Is there evidence of chronic active Hepatitis (HBV/HCV)? (Yes/No)
What is the patient's Hemoglobin (Hb) level in gm/dl?
Is the patient currently on anti-tuberculosis treatment? (Yes/No)
Which ART regimen is chosen (I or II)?
If second-line ART is indicated, is it needed? (Yes/No)
